vision.problem: Field inspectors capture findings on paper in areas with no signal, then retype everything at the office; photos get lost and reports ship days late.
vision.success:
A sole user completes the core task end-to-end on their first visit.
Task time reduced by 60% per inspection
vision.audience: Field inspectors and their back-office reviewers

decisions.title: Cross-platform over native
decisions.decision: React Native + a sync-capable local store
decisions.rationale: One codebase for iOS/Android with an offline-first data layer

claudeMd:
## Tech Stack
- Compute: AWS Lambda (or Cloudflare Workers)
- API: API Gateway / Hono
- Database: DynamoDB / D1
- IaC: SST / Terraform

## Patterns
- One function per route/handler
- Stateless; no local disk
- Idempotent handlers

## Constraints
- Cold-start budget < 1s
- No long-running processes
- Secrets via env / secret store only
architectureStyle: Architecture: mobile app client talking to a backend API.
platforms: Single mobile codebase for iOS + Android.
cloud: Deploy to AWS (ECS/Lambda, RDS, S3, CloudFront).
operations: DR: defined RTO (recovery time) & RPO (data-loss) targets.
budgetDirection: Budget: optimise Product-stage components — buy & configure proven products to deliver value.
Budget: outsource Commodity components — use managed/commodity services to stay efficient.
deliveryGovernance: Org: stream-aligned teams own end-to-end flow.
Approach: decisions recorded as ADRs in the repo.
testingStrategy: Testing: unit tests for core logic.
Testing: manual QA pass before release.
cicd: CI/CD: separate dev, staging & production environments.
deliveryContext: Context: migrate or replatform from an existing system.
risksAssumptions: Risk: uncertain data quality or availability.
security: Security: TLS 1.2+ for all traffic; HSTS.
Security: encrypt sensitive data at rest.
Security: secrets in a vault/secret store — never in code or env files committed.
Security: validate & sanitise all input at trust boundaries.
dataPrivacy: Data: identify & protect PII; minimise collection.
Data: store data in required region(s) for residency/sovereignty.
Data: automated backups + tested disaster recovery.
localization: i18n: externalise strings; support multiple languages.
i18n: store UTC; display in the user timezone.
integrations: Store files in S3-compatible object storage.
apiDelivery: API is internal/private — not publicly exposed.
designNotes: Light + dark themes that follow the OS setting.
Palette: emerald primary on charcoal neutrals.
Follow Material Design 3 — elevation, motion, dynamic colour.
Meet WCAG 2.1 AA: contrast, labels, focus order, ARIA.
Design empty, loading, and error states for every view.
